propositions: Select the front Autosubmit+submittable change/chain using FIFO ordering keyed on the Autosubmit vote's ApprovalInfo.date, oldest-voted-submittable-first.
Detect a relation chain via RelatedChanges and route a >1-member non-merge chain to rebase:chain, while a single non-merge change uses plain rebase.
A --no-ff merge change must always use plain rebase (first-parent-only), never rebase:chain.
Set rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader=true so the original human uploader and DCO Signed-off-by/rebar-ticket trailers are preserved while Verified is dropped for CI re-run.
Provide a stdlib-only Gerrit helper reusing the urllib+Basic-auth+XSSI pattern without importing src/rebar or adding pygerrit2, authenticating as RebarBotNava via SSM-backed HTTP password.
Test FIFO ordering and merge-vs-chain-vs-single routing against recorded Gerrit JSON, plus a live check asserting the uploader and trailers are unchanged after rebase.
